sourcesContent:
# MATH-wave operators: `//` floor division with its compound
# form. `//` shares the `/` scan prefix with regex literals and `///`
# heregex openers — the ambiguous positions here pin the
# disambiguation. (`%%` true modulo lowers through an INLINE helper
# with a helper-referencing shape — a documented
# lowering difference — so `%%` rows live in test/smallgaps.test.js
# by the sexpr/token/eval layers, not in the shared corpus, whose
# byte layer requires normalized equality.)
q1 = 7 // 2
q2 = -7 // 2
q3 = a // b // c
q4 = a // b + c
q5 = (a // b) * 2
x = 9
x //= 2
arr = [a // b, c // d]
f(a // b)
z1 = a / b
z2 = a/b
z3 = a //b
